assertions.title: JSON output works from root, group, and leaf flag positions

steps.action: Create a mission with leaf position: bun run src/index.ts mission create --file plan.json --json
steps.expected: Valid JSON output with mission object
steps.observed: Valid JSON output with mission id, status, title, description, milestones, features, createdAt, updatedAt fields

steps.action: Create a mission with group position: bun run src/index.ts mission --json create --file plan.json
steps.expected: Valid JSON output with same structure
steps.observed: Valid JSON output with identical structure to leaf position test

steps.action: Create a mission with root position: bun run src/index.ts --json mission create --file plan.json
steps.expected: Valid JSON output with same structure
steps.observed: Valid JSON output with identical structure to leaf and group position tests

steps.action: Test feature list command with JSON: bun run src/index.ts feature list --mission <id> --json
steps.expected: Valid JSON output containing features array
steps.observed: Valid JSON array with feature objects containing id, missionId, milestoneId, status, title, description, skillName, verificationSteps, dependsOn, createdAt, updatedAt

steps.action: Test mission list command with JSON: bun run src/index.ts mission list --json
steps.expected: Valid JSON output containing mission array
steps.observed: Valid JSON array with all missions created during testing

mission.title: Cross-Cutting Test Mission
mission.description: A test mission for JSON flag position validation

mission.title: Cross-Cutting Test Mission
mission.description: A test mission for JSON flag position validation

summary: Tested VAL-CROSS-002: JSON output works from root, group, and leaf flag positions. All three flag positions (leaf: mission create --json, group: mission --json create, root: --json mission create) emit valid JSON with identical structure. Additional commands (feature list, mission list, mission show) also produce valid JSON output. 1 assertion tested: 1 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
